Discover a New Perspective

Welcome to Global Frames

Your premier destination for unforgettable event experiences. With over 15 years of expertise and more than 1000 successful events, we bring your dreams to life. Whether it's a wedding, corporate event, or private party, we're here to help you every step of the way, from planning to celebration.

Book Now

Global Frames

We, global frames, are an agency that organizes symposiums, we create promotional videos, posters, film events and document experiences

Currently many universities internationally are hosting an annual symposium event about photography, 5 days, 5 speakers, a different university every week.

The 2026 International Photography Symposium will help photographers, university students and people passionate about photography learn from photographers from all around the world, discover their process, and unlock your inspiration. We strive to bring you interesting perspectives and styles, and redefine how you take pictures as we, global frames, will document, take pictures and record every moment of the way for this special event, If you want awesome photography for events.

Our Philosophy

Every place holds more than one story. We focus on capturing what’s actually happening; real moments, real reactions, real energy. Nothing staged, nothing forced.

We’re also big believers in sharing what we know. Through side-by-side comparisons, behind-the-scenes breakdowns, and angle variations, we show how perspective changes an image and how small choices shape the final result.

And above all, we work with respect for the space and the people in it.

What We Believe In

Symposiums are built around strong ideas. But visually, they're often covered in the same predictable way : one camera, one recording, one point of view.

We think ideas deserve better framing. Clear visuals, thoughtful composition, and intentional storytelling make a difference. We don't just record what happens on stage, we capture the atmosphere around it.

Our Strategy

We combine creative storytelling with clean visual structure to keep the focus where it matters. Our approach is based on three principles:

  • Authentic capture - Real moments and genuine emotion
  • Educational transparency - Explaining our process, not hiding it
  • Smartwatch ticket Integration - Expanding the experience beyond the live event

The goal isn't just documentation. It's clarity, depth, and impact.

Our Visual Language

Our visuals are structured but organic. Creative, but never distracting. We focus on clarity and rhythm, using:

  • Side-by-side angle comparisons
  • Behind-the-scenes insights
  • Motion design for speaker introductions
  • Minimalist compositions inspired by classical framing

For us, perspective isn't just aesthetic. It changes how ideas are understood.

Why We Chose This Identity

Our visual identity draws inspiration from the origins of symposiums in Ancient Greece; spaces dedicated to dialogue and shared thought. The warm cream and brown tones reflect that classical foundation and create a timeless atmosphere.

The accent colors represent cultural diversity and echo the way a camera captures light: different tones coming together within a single frame.

Smart Access: Wristbands & Smartwatches

Instead of paper tickets, participants use dedicated wristbands or smartwatches with their event badge built directly into the device.

This creates faster entry, smoother movement between spaces, and a more seamless experience from check-in to the end of the symposium.

Our Mission

At Global Frames, we capture symposiums through multi-angle storytelling and thoughtful visual design. We aim to make ideas clearer, more engaging, and more memorable through both creativity and technology.

We don't just frame events, we help frame the ideas behind them.
